'''MerrWeapons''' was a division of [[Merr-Sonn Mil/Sci]] dedicated to manufacturing weapons.<ref name="HSCS" /> One of its products was the [[WorldArmor 9 Planetary Shield]].<ref name="HS" />

{{Company-stub}}
